text.title: A11y No-Regression PR Gate — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the gate output shape and the waiver record shape. Agent / CI step running the gate must satisfy these.

forbidden.pattern: decision=pass with violations_new.critical > 0 (no critical may be silently waived)
baseline_ref pointing to a feature-branch SHA instead of main / trunk
scanned_routes empty when PR diff touches UI files
waiver_record with reviewer field equal to PR author OR empty
waiver_record with expiry date > today + 90 days
decision=pass with violations_new.serious > 0 AND no waiver entries for those specific violations

allowed-transformations.transformation: Aggregate identical violation across multiple instances of the same component into a single record (with instance_count).
Merge two waivers that share the same WCAG criterion + selector into one entry with combined rationale.
Re-run a flaky scan ONE time before reporting failure; if both runs agree, report the result.

list.item: rationale: 1-2 sentences explaining why the violation cannot be fixed now
reviewer: named individual (NOT the PR author)
tracking_ticket: link to the fix ticket
No new critical violations OR every new critical has a current waiver (r3)
No new serious violations OR every new serious has a current waiver (r3)
Any new moderate / minor violations have a-ack line in PR description (r5)
Baseline reference points to main / trunk (r2)
Scanned routes match the routes impacted by the diff (r4)
No waiver with reviewer == PR author OR expiry > 90 days (r3)
